bupt.ta.model

类 AdminSettings

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.model.AdminSettings

  • public class AdminSettings
extends java.lang.Object
    Admin-managed recruitment rules.

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 具体方法

      java.lang.String getMailAppBaseUrl() 
      java.lang.String getMailFrom() 
      java.lang.String getMailHost() 
      java.lang.String getMailPassword()
      Stored as plain text in admin settings (sufficient for a course project; use secrets manager in production).
      int getMailPort() 
      java.lang.String getMailUsername() 
      int getMaxSelectedJobsPerTa()

      void setMaxSelectedJobsPerTa(int maxSelectedJobsPerTa) 
      void setMaxWorkloadHoursPerTa(double maxWorkloadHoursPerTa) 
      boolean usesHourWorkloadLimit()
      True when hour-based recruitment cap is active (takes precedence over job count).
